div.h3: Static File Serving Path: resolve_path(), MIME Detection, and Response Construction

ol.li: Return -1 → HTTP 404 (not 403; do not reveal serve root)

div.p: Linear scan MIME_TABLE[] .html → text/html; charset=utf-8 .css → text/css .js → application/javascript .json → application/json .png → image/png .jpg → image/jpeg .svg → image/svg+xml .wasm → application/wasm

c snprintf(header_buf, sizeof(header_buf), "%s 200 OK
" "Content-Type: %s
" "Content-Length: %lld
" "Connection: %s
" "
", http_ver, mime, (long long)file_size, conn_str);
